---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A brief description of the feature you are requesting.

## Problem or Motivation

What problem does this solve? What use case does it address?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you would like it to work from a user perspective.

## Deadlands Classic Rules Reference

If this feature implements a specific rule from the Deadlands Classic rulebook, please cite the relevant page or section so it can be verified.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you have considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or references that would help.
